LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JANETTE WILSON'S FIRST AMENDED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE AMENDMENT WOULD GREATLY EXPAND THE ISSUES OF THE CASE ON THE EVE OF TRIAL, AVOID ANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DO SO WITHOUT A SHOWING OF DILIGENCE. THE DENIAL IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEWING THE REQUEST IF TRIAL IS CONTINUED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Russo, Esq. of Sterling & Clark, 415-543-5300 for defendant and moving party Seariver Maritime Inc.
S. Reed Morgan, Esq., 830-995-2464 for plaintiff and opposing party Janette Wilson

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted and MODIFIED its LATE tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SEARIVER MARITIME, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, Deny motion for summary adjudication. Triable issue of fact whether plaintiff failed to pursue ongoing medical treatment. See evidence cited by Plaintiff in response to defendant's UMF 23. See evidence cited in Plaintiff's Statement of Other Material Facts in Dispute, UMF 7 (Morgan Decl. para. 8 and Ex. G); UMF 8 (Morgan Decl. para. 8 and Ex. G; Wilson dec. paras. 19 and 21); UMF 11 (Morgan Decl. para 11 and Ex. I); UMF 12 (Morgan Dec. para. 12 and Ex J; Frates deposition at 83-85, attached as Morgan Decl. Ex. 2) Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153(301/MJM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-06-2011 Continued To May-13-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Ntc And Motion For Leave To File 3rd Supplemental Complaiont
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JANETTE WILSON'S Ntc And Motion For Leave To File 3rd Supplemental Complaint IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF AMENDED MOTION. (301/PJB)

First Amended Motion For Leave To File 3rd Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
S. Reed Morgan, Esq. of Morgan & Chadick, 830-995-2464 for plaintiff and moving party Janette Wilson
David Russo, Esq. of Sterling & Clack, 415-543-3335 for defendant and opposing party Seariver Maritime

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF JANETTE WILSON'S First Amended Motion For Leave To File 3rd Amended Complaint IS DENIED. THE AMENDMENT WOULD GREATLY EXPAND THE ISSUES OF THE CASE ON THE EVE OF TRIAL, AVOID ANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DO SO WITHOUT A SHOWING OF DILIGENCE. THE DENIAL IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEWING THE REQUEST IF TRIAL IS CONTINUED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
